name: Yie Ar Kung-Fu
description: Yie Ar Kung-Fu is a 2D side-scrolling fighting game where the player controls Oolong, a martial artist on a quest to avenge his family's honor and prove his kung-fu skills. The game consists of a series of one-on-one battles against eleven unique opponents, each a master of a different fighting style and possessing their own special moves and abilities. These opponents range from weapon-wielding fighters to martial arts experts who can throw projectiles or perform rapid attack combos. The player progresses through these fights sequentially, and each opponent presents a new challenge in terms of speed, attack range, and special abilities. The goal is to defeat all eleven opponents and ultimately triumph as the master of kung-fu. Each fight continues until one of the fighters' health bar is depleted.
